task_completion.description: Read the access control memo to identify required roles and assignments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of ~/Desktop/access_control_memo.txt.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Team Lead' custom role in Sentrifugo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sentrifugo Roles management page showing 'Team Lead' added to the list of roles.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Finance Clerk' custom role in Sentrifugo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sentrifugo Roles management page showing 'Finance Clerk' added to the list of roles.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Program Coordinator' custom role in Sentrifugo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sentrifugo Roles management page showing 'Program Coordinator' added to the list of roles.

task_completion.description: Reassign EMP005 and EMP017 to the 'Team Lead' role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sentrifugo Employee or Users list/profile page showing EMP005 and EMP017 assigned to the 'Team Lead' role.

task_completion.description: Reassign EMP009 to the 'Finance Clerk' role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sentrifugo Employee or Users list/profile page showing EMP009 assigned to the 'Finance Clerk' role.

task_completion.description: Reassign EMP014 to the 'Program Coordinator' role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sentrifugo Employee or Users list/profile page showing EMP014 assigned to the 'Program Coordinator' role.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sentrifugo web interface to create roles and assign employees.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Sentrifugo web application in a browser, rather than using terminal commands or database scripts to alter roles.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify or delete any existing default roles.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Roles management page should still display the default roles (e.g., Super Admin, Management, Manager, Employee) alongside the newly created ones.

integrity.description: The employee assignments are genuinely applied in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Employee role changes should be visible in the Sentrifugo web interface (e.g., Employee Management or Users section), not just written in a text file or terminal output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create exactly three roles: 'Team Lead', 'Finance Clerk', and 'Program Coordinator'. The agent must assign the following employees to these roles: EMP005 -> Team Lead, EMP009 -> Finance Clerk, EMP014 -> Program Coordinator, EMP017 -> Team Lead. Existing roles must not be modified or deleted.
